channel.title: Programming Career on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in Programming Career on simeononsecurity

item.title: Software Development Career Playbook
item.category: "software development career" , "software engineer career" , "software developer career guide" , "programming career" , "developer career path" , "coding career" , "software engineering jobs"
item.description: A comprehensive guide to starting, growing, and leading a software development career. Covers programming languages, education paths, job searching, career advancement, and engineering leadership.
